discounts.title: Discount Codes
discounts.description: Create and manage discount codes for users
discounts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete discount "{code}"?
discounts.codeDescription: Unique code for the discount. Auto-generated but can be edited.
discounts.typeDescription: Choose between fixed amount or percentage discount
discounts.valueFixedDescription: Enter the fixed amount to discount in EUR
discounts.startDateDescription: When the discount becomes available for use
discounts.maxUsesDescription: Leave empty for unlimited uses. Maximum number of times this discount can be used.
discounts.assignUsersDescription: Select specific users to assign this discount to. Leave empty to make it available to all users.
discounts.searchUsers: Search users by name or email...
discounts.searchUsersMin: Type at least 2 characters to search
discounts.codeExistsDodo: Discount code already exists in Dodo Payments
discounts.noDiscountsDescription: Create your first discount code to get started.
discounts.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after start date
discounts.codeTooLong: Discount code must be less than 50 characters
discounts.codeInvalid: Code must contain only uppercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
discounts.atLeastOneUser: At least one user must be selected
discounts.allUsersHaveDiscount: All selected users already have this discount
discounts.exceedsMaxUses: Cannot assign discount: would exceed maximum uses ({maxUses})
